scripts.dev: mkdir -p dist && cp src/index.html dist/ && cp -r static dist/ && bun run decompress-dice && concurrently "bun x tailwindcss -i src/styles.css -o dist/styles.css --watch" "bun build src/dice.js --outfile dist/dice.js --watch" "bun build src/blackbox.js --outfile dist/blackbox.js --watch --define ENDPOINT_URL='\"http://localhost:8080/blackbox\"'" "bun --hot serve.ts"
scripts.build: bun x tailwindcss -i src/styles.css -o dist/styles.css --minify && bun build src/dice.js --outfile dist/dice.js --minify && bun build src/blackbox.js --outfile dist/blackbox.js --minify --define ENDPOINT_URL='"https://organic.dyyni.org/blackbox"' && cp src/index.html dist/ && cp -r static dist/ && bun run decompress-dice
